name: digital-being
description: Project-local Codex skills for Sunny Street Digital Being asset authoring, runbooks, and offline validation in pixel-forge.

interface.shortDescription: Asset authoring, runbook, and validation skills for pixel-forge Digital Beings.
interface.longDescription: A project-local harness for generating, recording, and validating Sunny Street Digital Being asset runs. The plugin uses Codex image generation skills for creative assets, consumes pixel-forge's canonical schemas and deterministic sprite pipeline, and keeps plugin scripts offline.
defaultPrompt: Create a Digital Being character asset pack
Generate a Digital Being sprite sheet
Generate Sunny Street props and map assets
